query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: OPEC+ to Boost Oil Output Amid Shifting Market Dynamics
articles.description: OPEC+ is likely to increase its output targets from August, adding about 188,000 barrels per day. This decision aligns with the phased rollback of a 1.65 million bpd supply cut. The reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and other global factors are impacting oil prices and production decisions.

articles.title: The cheapest place to get petrol and diesel in Greater Manchester today - Wednesday, July 1
articles.description: Use our interactive widget to fill your car for less

articles.title: Pilot EV grant scheme fully subscribed within one hour
articles.description: A pilot scrappage scheme, to encourage motorists with older petrol and diesel cars to switch to electric vehicles (EVs), was fully subscribed an hour after opening this morning.

articles.title: Amazon and JCPenney offer customers relief with gas deals for holiday weekend
articles.description: Gas prices fell in most states last week, bringing the national average down nearly 7 cents to $3.78 per gallon, the lowest since March, according to GasBuddy

articles.title: Domestic passenger vehicle sales rise 24.6% in June on strong rural demand
articles.description: Passenger vehicle sales touched about 400,000 units in June, supported by tax relief, lower interest rates and robust rural demand, though higher crude oil prices remain a concern

articles.title: Fuel station employee assaulted in Coimbatore for denying loose petrol in plastic bottle
articles.description: A fuel station employee in Coimbatore was assaulted for refusing to sell loose petrol, allegedly by men claiming political connections.

articles.title: AG Rejects Reports That Centre Described E20 Fuel Programme As An ‘Experiment’
articles.description: India’s Attorney General has rejected media reports claiming that the Centre described its 20 per cent ethanol blended petrol programme as an experiment before the Supreme Court, saying no such submission was made and the claims misrepresented court arguments, according to an official clarification issued after confusion over proceedings linked to BPCL petition and ethanol policy debate.

articles.title: Crude Reversal: Russia Buys Indian Petrol To Plug Supply Gaps Triggered By Ukrainian Attacks
articles.description: The imports come as Russia grapples with fuel shortages across its 11 time zones, leading to fuel rationing, long queues at filling stations and record-high domestic gasoline prices.

articles.title: Why are oil prices down today, and will Brent futures and US WTI crude prices continue to fall or rise again? Iran-US talks, Strait of Hormuz recovery and US inventory data keep crude market under foc
articles.description: Oil prices declined as investors watched Iran-US talks, the recovery of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, and upcoming US inventory data. Brent futures and US WTI crude remained under pressure after recent gains faded. Analysts say supply expectations, inventory trends, and geopolitical developments will decide the next direction of crude prices.

articles.title: Never told Supreme Court E20 blending programme is ‘experiment’: Attorney General rejects ‘completely false’ reports
articles.description: Attorney General (AG) R Venkataramani office said, “At no stage was any submission made that the Government’s Ethanol Blended Petrol (EBP) Programme or the E20 blending programme is an ‘experiment'.”
